surface_verification.justification: CI-workflow hardening (remove vestigial '|| true' from integration gate) + test-file lint hygiene (add pathlib.Path import). No web/API/CLI/store/SSE/message-contract surface touched; nothing user-experienceable to drive through a running stack.

behaviors.behavior: shared/tests/test_events_log.py: pathlib.Path resolves in lazy annotations; ruff F821 cleared (was 14 → 0)
behaviors.evidence: uvx ruff check shared/tests/test_events_log.py --select F821 → 'All checks passed!' (0 errors, previously 14); full-rule ruff on the file also clean (no I001 import-sort regression from the added import); `cd shared && pytest tests/test_events_log.py -q` → 25 passed

behaviors.behavior: Integration suite runs green under the exact CI command — the precondition that un-swallowing '|| true' cannot turn CI red on existing tests
behaviors.evidence: uv run --with pytest --with pytest-mock pytest integration-tests/ -v → 136 passed / 0 failed (CI-parity command). Full shared suite also green: 2635 passed, 14 skipped.

behaviors.behavior: Removing '|| true' makes the integration-tests CI step propagate a non-zero exit (gate) instead of swallowing it
behaviors.reason: Observing CI actually turn red on a failing integration suite requires a live GitHub Actions run with an injected failure; the gating itself is platform-guaranteed (GHA default Linux shell = `bash --noprofile --norc -eo pipefail`, so -e is already active for a single-command run:). Structurally verified here: grep confirms '|| true' is removed from ONLY the integration step (the lint step retains its own '|| true' + continue-on-error, which is an explicitly separate out-of-scope item).

degraded.detail: check_iterate_isolation (--stage f0) reported main_tree_leak for 2 untracked files in the MAIN repo root (_wt_setup.json.txt, _tests_listing.txt) — stdout-redirect debris from a CONCURRENT iterate run (iterate-2026-05-31-plugin-sync-triage-main-repo; its worktree + checked-out branch + iterate_active pointer are all present, written ~13:23). Not produced by this run (no command here redirects to those names) and physically excluded from this PR (separate worktree + explicit per-path `git add`, never -A). Left untouched per the constitution (did not create them; the parallel run may be live). This iterate's own diff is isolated entirely to its worktree (2 files, +2/-1).
